children.heading: In general
children.label: a In general
children.text: Not later than 180 days after , the Administrator shall develop and implement a preventive maintenance validation process for security-related technology deployed to airports.October 5, 2018

children.heading: Maintenance by Administration personnel at airports
children.label: b Maintenance by Administration personnel at airports

children.text: Guidance to Administration personnel at airports specifying how to conduct and document preventive maintenance actions.
Mechanisms for the Administrator to verify compliance with the guidance issued pursuant to paragraph (1).

children.heading: Maintenance by contractors at airports
children.label: c Maintenance by contractors at airports

children.text: Provision of monthly preventative maintenance schedules to appropriate Administration personnel at each airport that includes information on each action to be completed by contractor.1So in original. Probably should be preceded by “a”.1
Notification to appropriate Administration personnel at each airport when maintenance action is completed by a contractor.
A process for independent validation by a third party of contractor maintenance.

children.heading: Penalties for noncompliance
children.label: d Penalties for noncompliance
children.text: The Administrator shall require maintenance for any contracts entered into 60 days after , or later for security-related technology deployed to airports to include penalties for noncompliance when it is determined that either preventive or corrective maintenance has not been completed according to contractual requirements and manufacturers’ specifications.October 5, 2018
